name: Jerk Chicken (Weightwatchers)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except chicken until the mixture forms a paste.
2. Rub chicken evenly with spice mixture; cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight.
3. Preheat broiler. Broil chicken on rack for 10-15 minutes, turning once, until cooked through.
Each serving provides: 1 fat gram, 3 protein grams, 15 calories. Per serving: 184 calories.
